style: Graphic-novel illustration, bold inked linework, cel-shaded flats with hard shadow edges, limited palette of rust orange, soot charcoal and pale amber, dramatic single key light. Painterly sci-fi comic panel. No text, no speech bubbles, no captions, no lettering, no borders, no panel gutters.

images.scene: Exterior of a small unmanned deep-space relay station: a rusted lattice mast with a single dish, one amber warning lamp, no windows lit, drifting against a dark starfield with a debris halo, no people.
